name: Global AI Hackathon 2026
description: A 48-hour hackathon where participants build AI-powered applications solving real-world problems.

name: GreenTech Innovation Challenge
description: Build sustainable technology solutions for a greener future. Open to all developers and designers.

name: Web3 & Blockchain Builder Jam

name: Hack the Future
description: Robotics and IoT hackathon for university students. Bring your own hardware or use ours.
